title: Implement execution-grill-with-docs skill
description: Stamp src/template/.claude/skills/execution-grill-with-docs/{SKILL.md, CONTEXT-FORMAT.md, ADR-FORMAT.md} as an .excn-native fork of grill-with-docs, and mirror into root .claude/skills/ (Src-First). The fork subsumes the design resolutions of EXEC-024, EXEC-026, EXEC-027, EXEC-028, EXEC-029: glossary writes to .excn/CONTEXT.md only, ADR scan/write targets .excn/adr/ continuing the existing numbering, the multi-context CONTEXT-MAP convention is dropped for the single-namespace stance, mid-grill philosophies are parked as retro observations, and the skill reads host pointer targets explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: glossary writes target .excn/CONTEXT.md only — no second root glossary (resolves EXEC-024)
ADR scan/write targets .excn/adr/ and continues the existing 0001/0002 numbering (resolves EXEC-026)
the multi-context CONTEXT-MAP convention is dropped; the skill takes the single-namespace stance (resolves EXEC-027)
mid-grill philosophies are routed as retro observations, not dropped (resolves EXEC-028)
the skill reads host pointer targets explicitly rather than root-path defaults (resolves EXEC-029)
root .claude/skills/ mirror is byte-identical to src (Src-First)
a grill run writes all decision records to the framework .excn location with zero translation language
notes: Re-scoped from 'Resolve grill-with-docs: fork vs adapt' for sprint 2 (fork direction ruled by Brooks 2026-06-07; design grill closed under PRD-005). Subsumes the design resolutions of EXEC-024/026/027/028/029 — no closes_issues schema field exists, so the subsumption is recorded here ownership-style; those issues stay open and close when this ships. Skill name fixed to execution-grill-with-docs (Work Grill fork decision). Lands as 0.3.0. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_2 item S2-1): .excn-native execution-grill-with-docs (SKILL.md + CONTEXT-FORMAT.md + ADR-FORMAT.md); explicit-path discovery, single context, ADRs to .excn/adr/, mid-grill philosophy via PRD notes→retro, inline glossary writes; alignment PASS 0 violations; src+root mirrored. Subsumes EXEC-024/026/027/028/029 (cascade-closed).
